translations.title: Pemeriksa skrol migrasi
translations.headerInfoText: Ambil kerajaan sasaran migrasi mengikut kuasa carian, kemudian tapis dan halaman dalam satu skrin. Data API diambil melalui proksi Node.js tempatan.
translations.searchPlaceholder: Tapis mengikut kerajaan, status atau ranking
translations.statusFilterHelp: Pemilihan berbilang tersedia. Jika tiada dipilih, semua status akan dipaparkan.
translations.emptyState: Tiada kerajaan yang sepadan dengan penapis semasa.
translations.noPowerCache: Tiada cache untuk kuasa carian ini. Klik Ambil.
translations.invalidPowerInput: Masukkan kuasa carian dalam format {xxx.x}B atau {xxxx}M (contoh: 3.5B).
translations.rankChartNoCachedPowers: No cached data exists. Fetch data first.
translations.rankChartInvalidSelection: Select multiple cached lists or enter a power range.
translations.rankChartLibraryMissing: Chart.js failed to load. Check your network connection and reload.
translations.rankChartExportLibraryMissing: html2canvas failed to load. Check your network connection and reload.
translations.rankChartNoData: No rank distribution can be plotted for the selected conditions.
translations.rankChartExportNoCharts: There are no charts to save as an image.
translations.rankChartExportDone: Saved the charts as one image.
translations.exportTableImageAria: Save the currently displayed table as an image
translations.rankChartPageNote: Papar taburan langkah 100M daripada data cache.
